user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new interview assessment question, so that interviewers evaluate candidates consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Assessment Questions screen; When I click "Add new question" and enter the question with its rating set and requirement flags; Then the question is saved and appears in the questions list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add and edit rating sets, so that questions can be scored using defined values
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Assessment Questions screen; When I click "Add new rating set" and enter values like Average, Good, Excellent; Then the rating set is saved and available for questions

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to mark whether a response and a rating are required for each question, so that mandatory feedback is enforced during interviews
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a question; When I set Response required and Rating required flags; Then those requirements are stored and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to scope questions to specific employee classes and positions, so that the right questions appear for each role
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a question; When I configure All employee classes and All positions; Then the applicability is saved and displayed for the question

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the checklist order of questions, so that interviewers see them in a logical sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given questions exist; When I click "Checklist order" and reorder the questions; Then the new order is saved

user_story: As an interviewer, I want to preview the interview assessment questionnaire, so that I can confirm how it will appear before conducting interviews
acceptance_criteria: Given questions are configured; When I click "Preview Interview Assessment Questionnaire"; Then I see the questionnaire as it will be presented

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit or refresh existing questions and rating sets, so that assessment content stays current
acceptance_criteria: Given items are listed; When I click Edit on a question or rating set or click Refresh; Then changes are applied and the latest data is shown
